description: Current adapter readiness and rollout tracking for debugger platform shells. This file tracks platform shell completeness; the shared broker-owned harness remains the only runtime enforcement SSOT.

claude-code.notes: Shared harness is the enforcement SSOT; host hooks only inject and relay.

code-buddy.notes: Pseudo-hooks must forward into the shared broker-owned harness without shadow contracts.

codex.notes: runtime_guard plus shared harness implements broker-owned staged handoff.

copilot-cli.notes: Native hooks relay into the shared broker-owned harness.
